name: alpha-assistant
changelog: Your assistant can now schedule 1-1 meetings for you — connect Google Calendar once and say 'schedule intro 1-1s with my team'
New hires get scheduling done with them, not just reminded — the onboarding checklist item becomes a 5-minute conversation
No new setup required for existing users — upgrade keeps everything as-is
changelog_semver: Added packs/company-scheduling.md — Google Calendar-based 1-1 scheduling using Notion Team directory for attendees and USER.md / WORKSTYLE.md for constraints
TOOLS.md: Google Calendar MCP documented with per-host setup (Claude Desktop, Cursor, Claude Code, Codex CLI, openclaw) and minimal OAuth scopes (freebusy + events only)
onboarding/new-hire-flow.md: introduced pack-delegation table so checklist items that can be actively executed (scheduling today, more later) get offered instead of just reminded
packs/README.md + docs/SPEC.md: scheduling pack added to default shipping set; MCP requirement matrix added

download._note: sha256 + size are populated in the release-attached copy of this manifest. The in-repo copy intentionally omits them because its own hash would be a self-reference. Assistants read the remote manifest via manifest_url to get the live numbers.
